title: Device Home Screen - Power on Headset while in the app
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app UI does not update to show headset as connected when a paired headset is powered on while the app is open
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is already paired with the Android device but currently powered off.
3. Observe the Home screen of the app — the headset should appear under 'My Devices' with a 'Disconnected' status.
4. Power on the paired Poly Bluetooth headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
5. Wait for the headset to connect (look for the Bluetooth LED to become solid or hear the 'connected' voice prompt).
6. Observe the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen for the device status update.
expected: The app UI on the Home screen updates to show the headset as 'Connected' under 'My Devices', with the device name displayed and a connected status indicator (e.g., green dot or 'Connected' label).
